nasb.text: besides Solomon’s 3,300 chief deputies who were over the project and who ruled over the people who were doing the work.

esv.text: besides Solomon’s 3,300 chief officers who were over the work, who had charge of the people who carried on the work.

cnv.text: 除此以外，所羅門還有三千三百個監管工作的官長，管理作工的人民。

ccb.text: 此外，他还派了三千三百名监工，监督工人做工。
